arts.ttl: Hull City owner in furious snap back over match-fixing suggestions – Calls Turkish rivals ‘clowns’
arts.sum: Hull City owner Acun Ilıcalı has lashed out at Galatasaray vice president Metin Öztürk over match-fixing suggestions. The Hull City chairman is also actively involved at Fenerbahçe as their vice president and the Yellow Canaries official didn’t hold back when criticising his Galatasaray counterpart. arts.ttl: Seven Hull City players who could flourish under Ruben Selles after Tim Walter struggles
arts.sum: Unfortunately, Giles was another player City were unable to get the best out of under Walter following a summer of speculation about his future amid firm interest from Middlesbrough. City, though, need all the help they can get on the flanks given Mohamed Belloumi and Liam Millar are both out for the season, leaving Selles with Abu Kamara and Ryan Longman as his two frontline wingers, but Jarvis can have a part to play.

arts.ttl: Penalty save key as Watford Under-21s win away at Swansea
arts.sum: The Hornets won 3-1 with all four goals, and Roraigh Browne's vital penalty save, crammed into 13 second-half minutes.

arts.ttl: Owner Acun Ilicali to hand Ruben Selles much-needed Hull City transfer boost
arts.sum: The City owner will do what he can to help his new head coach when the window opens on New Year's Day, but he knows his man will need help in the transfer market, given two of his best players in the squad he inherits will be unavailable until next season. Ilicali, who made Selles his number one choice to replace Tim Walter, is thought to have been excited by Selles' vision for the team, and the way he wants to play football at City, classing it as a 'dream appointment' and one he believes will unite the club, after the divisive nature of the past few months following Liam Rosenior's exit, Walter's arrival and subsequent problematic tenure.
